title: 3 Facts About Your Brain

segments.text: Your brain can hold around two and a half million gigabytes of memory.
And it does all of that using less power than a light bulb.
It has about eighty six billion neurons, all firing at the same time.
Your brain feels no pain, because it has no pain receptors of its own.
It stays active even while you sleep, sometimes more than when you are awake.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Your brain runs on 20 watts and feels no pain. You are wild. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!

title: 3 Facts About The Sun

segments.text: The Sun is so big that one million Earths could fit inside it.
And it is only getting started.
Light from the Sun takes about eight minutes to reach your eyes.
Its core burns at around fifteen million degrees Celsius.
Every second, the Sun turns four million tons of itself into pure energy.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: A million Earths fit inside the Sun, and it eats 4 million tons of itself every second. Follow for daily facts!

title: 3 Facts About Dreams

segments.text: You will spend around six years of your life dreaming.
And your dreams are stranger than you remember.
Within minutes of waking up, you forget about ninety percent of your dreams.
Blind people dream too, using sound, touch, and emotion instead of images.
And every face you see in a dream is one your brain has seen before in real life.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: You spend 6 years of your life dreaming, and your brain can't invent new faces. Follow for daily facts!

title: 3 Facts About Antarctica

segments.text: Antarctica is the largest desert on the entire planet.
And almost nothing about it is what you would expect.
It holds about seventy percent of all the fresh water on Earth, frozen as ice.
Millions of years ago, Antarctica had forests and a warm climate.
Some valleys there have not seen rain or snow in two million years.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Antarctica is the biggest desert on Earth and once had forests. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!

title: 3 Facts About The Moon

segments.text: The Moon is slowly drifting away from Earth, about four centimeters every year.
And that is only the beginning.
The footprints left on the Moon will stay there for millions of years.
The Moon's gravity is what creates the ocean tides.
A single day on the Moon lasts about twenty nine Earth days.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: The Moon is drifting away from us, and its footprints will last millions of years. Follow for daily facts!

title: 3 Facts About Bees

segments.text: Bees can actually recognize human faces.
And they are far smarter than they look.
A single bee makes only about one twelfth of a teaspoon of honey in its whole life.
Bees talk to each other by dancing to share directions to food.
Honey never spoils. Jars thousands of years old are still edible today.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Bees recognize faces, dance to talk, and honey never spoils. Nature is wild. Follow for daily facts!

title: 3 Facts About The Deep Ocean

segments.text: We have explored more of outer space than our own oceans.
And what is down there sounds completely alien.
At the bottom of the ocean, the pressure could crush you almost instantly.
Many deep sea creatures make their own light to survive in total darkness.
The deepest point of the ocean is deeper than Mount Everest is tall.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: We've explored more of space than our oceans, and the deep sea makes its own light. Follow for daily facts!

title: 3 Facts About Blue Whales

segments.text: A blue whale's heart is roughly the size of a small car.
And the rest of it is just as unreal.
Its tongue alone can weigh as much as a full grown elephant.
You can hear its call from up to a hundred miles away.
It is the largest animal that has ever existed, bigger than any dinosaur.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: A blue whale's heart is the size of a car and it's bigger than any dinosaur. Follow for daily facts!

title: 3 Facts About Lightning

segments.text: A single bolt of lightning is five times hotter than the surface of the Sun.
And it is even stranger than it looks.
Lightning strikes the Earth around eight million times every single day.
It can strike the same spot many times. One skyscraper gets hit about twenty times a year.
And in one place in Venezuela, lightning storms happen almost every night.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Lightning is 5x hotter than the Sun and hits Earth 8 million times a day. Follow for daily facts!

title: 3 Facts About Dinosaurs

segments.text: Some dinosaurs lived closer to your time than to other dinosaurs.
And it gets even weirder.
The Stegosaurus and the T. rex are separated by more time than the T. rex and you.
Many of the dinosaurs we imagine were actually covered in feathers.
And birds are living dinosaurs, the direct descendants of them.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: The Stegosaurus is older to the T. rex than the T. rex is to us. History is wild. Follow for daily facts!

title: 3 Facts About Saturn

segments.text: Saturn is so light that it would actually float in water.
And its rings hide something strange.
Saturn's rings are made of billions of pieces of ice and rock.
Deep inside the planet, scientists think it actually rains diamonds.
And one single year on Saturn lasts about twenty nine Earth years.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Saturn would float in water and it rains diamonds inside it. Space is wild. Follow for daily facts!

title: 3 Facts About Wolves

segments.text: A wolf's howl can be heard up to ten miles away.
And there is far more to them than the myths.
Wolves can run at nearly forty miles per hour when they hunt.
A wolf pack is usually just a family, led by the parents.
And every dog alive today descended from wolves.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Every dog alive descended from wolves, and a pack is really just a family. Follow for daily facts!

title: 3 Psychology Facts About People

segments.text: People decide whether they trust you within the first seven seconds of meeting.
And your brain is doing way more behind the scenes than you think.
If you want someone to like you, ask them for a small favor. It actually works.
People will forget what you said, but never how you made them feel.
And quietly mirroring someone's body language makes them trust you more.
Follow for more psychology that sounds fake but is real.

description: Psychology facts that feel illegal to know. People decide if they trust you in 7 seconds. Follow for daily facts!

title: 3 Facts About Your Memory

segments.text: Every time you remember something, your brain slightly rewrites the memory.
Your memory is less like a recording and more like a story you keep retelling.
You cannot remember being a baby because that part of the brain is not developed yet.
Smells trigger memories more powerfully than any other sense.
And sleep is when your brain actually saves memories for the long term.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Your memory rewrites itself every time you use it. The brain is wild. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!

title: 3 Body Language Facts

segments.text: Your feet point toward whatever you really want, even when your words do not.
And people read it without even realizing it.
A real smile reaches the eyes. A fake one only moves the mouth.
Crossed arms do not always mean someone is defensive. Sometimes they are just cold.
And copying someone's posture quietly builds trust between you.
Follow for more psychology that sounds fake but is real.

description: Your feet point at what you really want. Body language never lies. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!

title: 3 Facts About Time

segments.text: Time literally moves slower for your feet than for your head.
And it only gets stranger from here.
Time passes faster the higher you are above the Earth.
Six hundred million years ago, a single day on Earth was only twenty one hours long.
And one second is officially defined by the vibrations of a cesium atom.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Time runs slower at your feet than your head. Physics is wild. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!

title: 3 Facts About Black Holes

segments.text: If you fell into a black hole, you would be stretched into a thin strand, like spaghetti.
And that is the least weird thing about them.
Time slows so much near a black hole that you could watch the future of the universe unfold.
Black holes are not really holes. They are objects so dense that not even light escapes.
The closest known black hole is about fifteen hundred light years from Earth.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Fall into a black hole and you'd be turned into spaghetti. Space is wild. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!

title: 3 Facts About Your Body

segments.text: Your body makes around twenty five million new cells every single second.
It is basically rebuilding you all the time.
The blood vessels in your body could wrap around the Earth more than twice.
Your stomach acid is strong enough to dissolve some metals.
And you produce enough saliva in your life to fill two swimming pools.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Your body builds 25 million cells every second. You are wild. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!

title: 3 Facts About Water

segments.text: The water you drink today is the same water the dinosaurs drank millions of years ago.
And water quietly breaks the rules of normal physics.
Hot water can sometimes freeze faster than cold water, and scientists still argue why.
Water is one of the only things on Earth that expands when it freezes.
And about sixty percent of your entire body is just water.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: You're drinking the same water as the dinosaurs. Nature is wild. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!

title: 3 Facts About Money

segments.text: Over ninety percent of the world's money does not physically exist.
It is just numbers on screens.
The very first ATM was inspired by a chocolate bar vending machine.
Paper money is not actually paper. It is mostly cotton.
And the smell of new money is just a chemical left from the printing process.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Over 90% of the world's money doesn't physically exist. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!

title: 3 Facts About Light

segments.text: The light hitting your eyes right now could be thousands of years old.
And light is hiding some serious weirdness.
Nothing in the entire universe can travel faster than light.
Light escaping the Sun's core can take thousands of years to reach the surface.
So when you look up at the night sky, you are literally looking into the past.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: When you look at the stars, you're looking into the past. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!

title: 3 Facts About Sleep

segments.text: After just one bad night of sleep, your brain starts clearing out its own cells.
Sleep is far more active than it looks.
You are actually slightly taller in the morning than you are at night.
While you sleep, your brain flushes out toxins it built up during the day.
And humans are the only animals that delay sleep on purpose.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: You're taller in the morning and your brain cleans itself at night. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!

title: 3 Facts About Music

segments.text: Your favorite song hits your brain with the same reward as food or money.
Music does things to your brain you do not even notice.
Listening to music you love releases dopamine, the brain's pleasure chemical.
Your heartbeat can actually start to sync with the rhythm of the music.
And sad music can make you feel good by triggering comforting hormones.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Your favorite song gives your brain the same hit as food. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!

title: 3 Facts About Your Eyes

segments.text: Your eyes can tell apart about ten million different colors.
And they are stranger than any camera ever built.
Everyone has a blind spot, but your brain quietly fills it in for you.
Brown eyes are actually blue underneath the brown pigment.
And your eyes stay almost the same size from birth, while your nose and ears never stop growing.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Brown eyes are secretly blue underneath. Your body is wild. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!
